The big-budget epic film released the same year as the film that focuses on a series of sudden, unexplained violent bird attacks is **"The Birds"** (1963). 

This film was directed by Alfred Hitchcock and is based on the 1952 story by Daphne du Maurier. It features a series of sudden, unexplained violent bird attacks on the people of Bodega Bay, California over the course of a few days.
